calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Petitioner, Man Chik Chow and Xing Chang Xie the parents for the MINOR, Thomas Jian An Zhou present in pro per and with Cantonese Interpreter, Mr. William Guan.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of MINOR'S NAME to: Thomas Jian An Chow.
Decree signed in open court.
